name: multichain-mcp
description: MCP server for AI agents — Stacks, Celo, and Base in one npm package.
long_description: Gives AI agents native access to Stacks, Celo, and Base from a single package. Free tier includes get_balance and get_prices. Pro unlocks get_portfolio and prepare_transfer. Team unlocks deploy_token. Write operations return unsigned transactions -- non-custodial by design.

multichain_license_key.title: License Key
multichain_license_key.description: Optional Lemon Squeezy license key. Omit to run on the Free tier (get_balance, get_prices). Unlocks get_portfolio and prepare_transfer on Pro, plus deploy_token on Team.
